metadata.title: Flavor Studios
metadata.description: एक समय में एक फ्रेम के साथ आत्मा से कहानियाँ गढ़ना।

header.ourStoryDesc: Flavor Studios के बारे में जानें

footer.brandDescription: एक समय में एक फ्रेम के साथ आत्मा से कहानियाँ गढ़ना। Flavor Studios एक वैश्विक एनीमेशन स्टूडियो है जो सार्थक 3D एनीमेशन और मूल एनीमे बनाने के लिए समर्पित है। शक्तिशाली कहानी कहने और भावनात्मक गहराई के माध्यम से, हम दुनिया भर के दर्शकों को प्रेरित, चंगा और जोड़ने का लक्ष्य रखते हैं।
footer.tagline: जुनून से निर्मित। सपनों से प्रेरित।

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.intro: Whether you have a question about our content, want to collaborate, or just want to say hello, we're here to help. Fill out the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

social.title: Social Media
social.description: DM us on any social platform

response.title: Response Time
response.description: We try to respond as quickly as possible

business.title: Business Inquiries
business.description: For sponsorships, business partnerships, or collaboration opportunities:

follow.title: Follow Us
follow.description: Connect with us on social media for updates and community discussions.

form.title: Send us a Message
form.description: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

success.title: Message sent successfully!
success.description: We'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.

flagged.title: Message Submitted — Needs Review
flagged.description: Thank you for your message! Our system flagged it for moderation and a team member will review and respond if appropriate.

error.title: Failed to send message
error.description: Please try again or contact us directly via email.

error.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

message.label: Message *
message.placeholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...

error.minLength: Message must be at least 10 characters long

error.required: You must accept the privacy policy

items.1: You'll receive an email confirmation immediately.
items.2: Our team will review your message within 24 hours.
items.3: We'll respond with helpful information or next steps.
items.4: For complex inquiries, we may schedule a follow-up call.

1.title: Submit Your Message
1.description: Fill out our contact form with your details and inquiry. Be as specific as possible to help us understand your needs.

2.title: Initial Assessment
2.description: You'll receive an immediate confirmation. Our team reviews all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.

3.title: Personalized Response
3.description: We'll respond with tailored information addressing your specific questions or concerns.

4.title: Ongoing Support
4.description: For complex matters, we may schedule additional communication to ensure your inquiry is fully resolved.

cta.title: Need Quick Answers?
cta.description: Before reaching out, check our comprehensive FAQ page where we've answered the most common questions about our content, collaborations, and services.

support.title: Support Our Creative Vision
support.description: We're committed to crafting emotionally powerful anime, original 3D animations, and meaningful storytelling experiences — all built independently using Blender and open-source tools.
support.securePayments: Secure payments processed through Buy Me a Coffee

impact.title: Your Support Makes a Difference
impact.description: Every contribution directly impacts our ability to create and share amazing content

creativeFreedom.title: Creative Freedom
creativeFreedom.description: Maintain creative independence and artistic integrity in all our projects.

qualityContent.title: Quality Content
qualityContent.description: Invest in better tools, training, and resources to elevate animation quality.

communityGrowth.title: Community Growth
communityGrowth.description: Build a thriving community of animation enthusiasts and independent creators.

quote.text: "If you believe in the value of independent animation and want to support our work, your contribution can help us continue producing high-quality content and grow our creative mission."

mainSupport.title: Ready to Support Our Journey?
mainSupport.description: Every contribution, no matter the size, helps us bring our creative vision to life
mainSupport.supportUsDescription: Your support is processed securely through Buy Me a Coffee and helps us continue creating amazing content

otherWays.title: Other Ways to Help
otherWays.description: Connect with us across our social platforms and help grow our community

shareContent.title: Share Our Content
shareContent.description: Help us reach more anime fans on YouTube

leaveReviews.title: Leave Reviews
leaveReviews.description: Join discussions on our Reddit community

faqSection.title: Have Questions?
faqSection.description: Find comprehensive answers about supporting our work, our creative process, and how your contributions make a difference
